The deuterons were recorded on Sakura
NR-M1 or NR-E1 100 mu nuclear emulsion plates after
being analyzed by the broad range magnetic spectrograph
CsI crystal of 0.7mm thick used for beam
monitoring. The beam was monitored by counting the
elastically scattered deuterons from each target.
